rationale: Educ. Code §11.159 governs training and orientation requirements for school district trustees. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A trustee must complete any training required by the State Board of Education.
_note: No textual relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this trustee-training statute. Rule is entirely unrelated to property tax exemptions.
